---
title: "Talks & Webinars"
author: "Christine Parker"
---

Parker C. Data Wrangling for Advocacy: Tidy Data to Support the Affordable Connectivity Program. 2024 August. Available from: <https://youtu.be/HwA-yVESg_Q?si=PBULGxnM2kHtefl> Other Significant Products,

Parker C. Maps, Maps, Maps: BEAD Challenges and Making Sense of Internet Access Maps in Texas. Institute for Local Self-Reliance; 2024 June. Available from: <https://youtu.be/5mqartseApc?si=hut1HcOoZXYYp5rg>

Parker C. Texas Digital Opportunity Plan - Resolving Access Gaps. Institute for Local Self- Reliance; 2024 January. Available from: <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=F7yfu4JvH8w>
